behavior_in_task_description.reason: All asserted names (sessionReadTimeout, READ_TIMEOUT_BUFFER, NodeClientKey, longFrom, fetchNodeTimeout, nodeTimeoutCache, httpClients, pageLoad, timeouts) are explicitly named in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction.md prescribes exact method names, field names, class names, types (ConcurrentMap<URI, Duration>, ConcurrentMap<NodeClientKey, CacheEntry>), the literal constant value Duration.ofSeconds(30), and even the calculation formula 'max(sessionReadTimeout, nodeTimeout) + READ_TIMEOUT_BUFFER' — this states the fix rather than just describing what's broken.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests assert on specific internal names like 'NodeClientKey', 'nodeTimeoutCache', 'longFrom', 'fetchNodeTimeout', 'READ_TIMEOUT_BUFFER' — a correct alternative fix using different names would fail these text-match tests.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: While many tests grep the source, test_bazel_build_compiles, test_repo_spotbugs, test_repo_router_tests, and test_repo_java_format execute bazel to verify real build/test behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p asserts non-trivial patterns (method signatures, type parameters, literal Duration.ofSeconds(30)) that a stub wouldn't satisfy; combined with bazel build requirement, stubs won't pass.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each of the 8 instruction requirements has a corresponding test (sessionReadTimeout, READ_TIMEOUT_BUFFER, NodeClientKey, timeout max calc, longFrom, fetchNodeTimeout Optional, nodeTimeoutCache, httpClients map type).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests grouped under 'Fail-to-Pass' and 'Pass-to-Pass' section banners with docstrings per test.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task is a Java code refactor, no structured data output.

no_typos.reason: File paths and identifiers are consistent between instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: The file HandleSession.java is the domain-obvious target for this fix, and instruction doesn't cite specific line numbers.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Code-only task, not a config edit.
